message:
✨ Binary-based quickstart: eliminate Go/Node.js prerequisites (#841)

* Switch from mattn/go-sqlite3 to modernc.org/sqlite (pure Go)

Eliminates CGO dependency for the console backend, enabling
cross-compilation to all platforms without C compiler toolchains.
This is prerequisite for distributing pre-built console binaries.

- Replace mattn/go-sqlite3 (CGO) with modernc.org/sqlite (pure Go)
- Change driver name from "sqlite3" to "sqlite"
- Remove gcc/musl-dev from Dockerfile (no longer needed)
- Set CGO_ENABLED=0 in Dockerfile
- Bump Go to 1.24 (required by modernc.org/sqlite)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* Add console binary to GoReleaser config

GoReleaser now builds both kc-agent and console binaries for all
platforms (linux/darwin x amd64/arm64). Console archives include
the pre-built web/dist frontend. The npm build runs as a before hook.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* Simplify release workflow: always build all binaries

- Always run GoReleaser (builds kc-agent + console for all platforms)
- Remove agent_changed conditional logic (no longer needed)
- Add Node.js setup in release job for frontend build
- Bump Go from 1.23 to 1.24
- Remove force_agent_release input (now always builds)
- Remove softprops/action-gh-release fallback

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* Add binary-based quickstart script (start.sh)

New start.sh downloads pre-built binaries from GitHub releases
instead of compiling from source. Eliminates Go, Node.js, and
Homebrew as prerequisites — only curl is needed.

Features:
- Auto-detects OS and architecture
- Downloads console + kc-agent binaries
- Starts services and waits for health check
- Auto-opens browser when ready
- Supports .env for optional OAuth configuration
- Supports --version, --dir, --port flags

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* Update setup dialog: binary quickstart, OAuth via startup-oauth.sh

- Single-step quickstart: curl start.sh | bash (downloads pre-built binaries)
- Prerequisites reduced from Go/Node.js/Homebrew/curl to just curl
- OAuth URLs updated from localhost:5174 to localhost:8080
- OAuth guide references startup-oauth.sh for enabling OAuth later
- Dev mode guide collapsed under "Or run from source" expandable
- Browser opens automatically, no manual step 2 needed

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -24,11 +24,6 @@ on:
         required: false
         default: false
         type: boolean
-      force_agent_release:
-        description: 'Force agent/Homebrew release even without changes'
-        required: false
-        default: false
-        type: boolean
 
 env:
   REGISTRY: ghcr.io
@@ -42,7 +37,6 @@ jobs:
       release_name: ${{ steps.version.outputs.release_name }}
       release_type: ${{ steps.type.outputs.release_type }}
       is_prerelease: ${{ steps.type.outputs.is_prerelease }}
-      agent_changed: ${{ steps.changes.outputs.agent_changed }}
       has_changes: ${{ steps.changes.outputs.has_changes }}
     steps:
       - name: Checkout repository
@@ -95,47 +89,14 @@ jobs:
         id: changes
         run: |
           LATEST_TAG="${{ steps.latest_tag.outputs.latest_tag }}"
-          FORCE_AGENT="${{ github.event.inputs.force_agent_release }}"
-          RELEASE_TYPE="${{ steps.type.outputs.release_type }}"
-
-          # For stable releases (weekly/patch/minor/major), always include agent
-          if [ "$RELEASE_TYPE" != "nightly" ]; then
-            echo "Stable release - including agent"
-            echo "agent_changed=true" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
-            echo "has_changes=true" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
-            exit 0
-          fi
-
-          # Check if forced
-          if [ "$FORCE_AGENT" = "true" ]; then
-            echo "Force agent release requested"
-            echo "agent_changed=true" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
-            echo "has_changes=true" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
-            exit 0
-          fi
 
           # Check for any changes since last tag
           if [ "$LATEST_TAG" = "v0.0.0" ]; then
             echo "No previous tag - including everything"
-            echo "agent_changed=true" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
             echo "has_changes=true" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
             exit 0
           fi
 
-          # Check for changes in agent-related paths
-          AGENT_PATHS="pkg/agent cmd/kc-agent go.mod go.sum"
-          AGENT_CHANGED="false"
-
-          for path in $AGENT_PATHS; do
-            if git diff --name-only "$LATEST_TAG"..HEAD | grep -q "^$path"; then
-              echo "Agent changes detected in: $path"
-              AGENT_CHANGED="true"
-              break
-            fi
-          done
-
-          echo "agent_changed=$AGENT_CHANGED" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
-
           # Check for any changes at all
           TOTAL_CHANGES=$(git rev-list "$LATEST_TAG"..HEAD --count)
           if [ "$TOTAL_CHANGES" -gt 0 ]; then
@@ -146,8 +107,6 @@ jobs:
             echo "No changes since last release"
           fi
 
-          echo "Agent changed: $AGENT_CHANGED"
-
       - name: Calculate new version
         id: version
         run: |
@@ -200,7 +159,7 @@ jobs:
       - name: Set up Go
         uses: actions/setup-go@3041bf56c941b39c61721a86cd11f3bb1338122a # v5.2.0
         with:
-          go-version: '1.23'
+          go-version: '1.24'
           cache: true
 
       - name: Set up Node.js
@@ -241,11 +200,17 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Set up Go
         uses: actions/setup-go@3041bf56c941b39c61721a86cd11f3bb1338122a # v5.2.0
-        if: needs.determine-version.outputs.agent_changed == 'true'
         with:
-          go-version: '1.23'
+          go-version: '1.24'
           cache: true
 
+      - name: Set up Node.js
+        uses: actions/setup-node@1d0ff469b7ec7b3cb9d8673fde0c81c44821de2a # v4.2.0
+        with:
+          node-version: '20'
+          cache: 'npm'
+          cache-dependency-path: web/package-lock.json
+
       - name: Set up Docker Buildx
         uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@b5ca514318bd6ebac0fb2aedd5d36ec1b5c232a2 # v3.10.0
 
@@ -272,8 +237,7 @@ jobs:
           git tag -a "$VERSION" -m "Release $VERSION"
           git push origin "$VERSION"
 
-      - name: Run GoReleaser (agent + Homebrew)
-        if: needs.determine-version.outputs.agent_changed == 'true'
+      - name: Run GoReleaser
         uses: goreleaser/goreleaser-action@9c156ee8a17a598857849441385a2041ef570552 # v6.3.0
         with:
           distribution: goreleaser
@@ -284,21 +248,6 @@ jobs:
           HOMEBREW_TAP_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.HOMEBREW_TAP_TOKEN }}
           RELEASE_NAME: ${{ needs.determine-version.outputs.release_name }}
 
-      - name: Create GitHub release (no agent)
-        if: needs.determine-version.outputs.agent_changed != 'true'
-        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@da05d552573ad5aba039eaac05058a918a7bf631 # v2.2.2
-        with:
-          tag_name: ${{ needs.determine-version.outputs.version }}
-          name: ${{ needs.determine-version.outputs.release_name }}
-          prerelease: ${{ needs.determine-version.outputs.is_prerelease == 'true' }}
-          generate_release_notes: true
-          body: |
-            ## Changes
-
-            This release contains web/console updates only. No changes to kc-agent binary.
-
-            The Homebrew formula was not updated as there are no agent changes.
-
       - name: Build and push Docker image
         uses: docker/build-push-action@14487ce63c7a62a4a324b0bfb37086795e31c6c1 # v6.16.0
         with:
@@ -324,7 +273,6 @@ jobs:
           echo "- **Version**: ${{ needs.determine-version.outputs.version }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
           echo "- **Type**: ${{ needs.determine-version.outputs.release_type }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
           echo "- **Pre-release**: ${{ needs.determine-version.outputs.is_prerelease }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-          echo "- **Agent changed**: ${{ needs.determine-version.outputs.agent_changed }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
           echo "- **Has changes**: ${{ needs.determine-version.outputs.has_changes }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
           echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
 
@@ -335,11 +283,8 @@ jobs:
             echo "### Artifacts" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
             echo "- GitHub Release: https://github.com/${{ github.repository }}/releases/tag/${{ needs.determine-version.outputs.version }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
             echo "- Docker Image: \`${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}:${{ needs.determine-version.outputs.version }}\`" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-            if [ "${{ needs.determine-version.outputs.agent_changed }}" = "true" ]; then
-              echo "- Homebrew: \`brew upgrade kc-agent\` (formula updated)" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-            else
-              echo "- Homebrew: No update (no agent changes)" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-            fi
+            echo "- Binaries: kc-agent + console for linux/darwin (amd64/arm64)" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+            echo "- Homebrew: \`brew upgrade kc-agent\`" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
           else
             echo "### Status: ${{ needs.release.result }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
           fi

@@ -1,14 +1,15 @@
-# GoReleaser config for kc-agent
+# GoReleaser config for kc-agent and console
 # Run: goreleaser release --clean
 # Test: goreleaser build --snapshot --clean
 
 version: 2
 
-project_name: kc-agent
+project_name: kubestellar-console
 
 before:
   hooks:
     - go mod tidy
+    - bash -c "cd web && npm ci && npm run build"
 
 builds:
   - id: kc-agent
@@ -26,13 +27,37 @@ builds:
       - -s -w
       - -X github.com/kubestellar/console/pkg/agent.Version={{.Version}}
 
+  - id: console
+    main: ./cmd/console
+    binary: console
+    env:
+      - CGO_ENABLED=0
+    goos:
+      - linux
+      - darwin
+    goarch:
+      - amd64
+      - arm64
+    ldflags:
+      - -s -w
+
 archives:
   - id: kc-agent
     builds:
       - kc-agent
     formats:
       - tar.gz
-    name_template: "{{ .ProjectName }}_{{ .Version }}_{{ .Os }}_{{ .Arch }}"
+    name_template: "kc-agent_{{ .Version }}_{{ .Os }}_{{ .Arch }}"
+
+  - id: console
+    builds:
+      - console
+    formats:
+      - tar.gz
+    name_template: "console_{{ .Version }}_{{ .Os }}_{{ .Arch }}"
+    files:
+      - src: "web/dist/**/*"
+        dst: "web/dist"
 
 checksum:
   name_template: "checksums.txt"
@@ -50,6 +75,8 @@ brews:
   - name: kc-agent
     # Skip if token is not set
     skip_upload: '{{ if .Env.HOMEBREW_TAP_TOKEN }}false{{ else }}true{{ end }}'
+    ids:
+      - kc-agent
     repository:
       owner: kubestellar
       name: homebrew-tap

@@ -1,11 +1,8 @@
 # Build stage - Backend
-FROM golang:1.23-alpine AS backend-builder
+FROM golang:1.24-alpine AS backend-builder
 
 WORKDIR /app
 
-# Install build dependencies
-RUN apk add --no-cache gcc musl-dev
-
 # Copy go mod files
 COPY go.mod go.sum ./
 RUN go mod download
@@ -14,7 +11,7 @@ RUN go mod download
 COPY . .
 
 # Build
-RUN CGO_ENABLED=1 GOOS=linux go build -o console ./cmd/console
+RUN CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux go build -o console ./cmd/console
 
 # Build stage - Frontend
 FROM node:20-alpine AS frontend-builder

@@ -0,0 +1,252 @@
+#!/bin/bash
+# KubeStellar Console - Quick Start
+#
+# Downloads pre-built binaries and starts the console locally.
+# No Go, Node.js, or build tools required — just curl.
+#
+# Usage:
+#   curl -sSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kubestellar/console/main/start.sh | bash
+#
+# Options:
+#   --version, -v <tag>   Specific version to download (default: latest stable)
+#   --dir, -d <path>      Install directory (default: ./kubestellar-console)
+#   --port, -p <port>     Console port (default: 8080)
+#
+# To enable GitHub OAuth login, create a .env file:
+#   GITHUB_CLIENT_ID=your-client-id
+#   GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET=your-client-secret
+#   FRONTEND_URL=http://localhost:8080
+
+set -e
+
+# --- Defaults ---
+INSTALL_DIR="./kubestellar-console"
+VERSION=""
+PORT=8080
+REPO="kubestellar/console"
+GITHUB_API="https://api.github.com"
+
+# --- Parse args ---
+while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
+    case $1 in
+        --version|-v) VERSION="$2"; shift 2 ;;
+        --dir|-d) INSTALL_DIR="$2"; shift 2 ;;
+        --port|-p) PORT="$2"; shift 2 ;;
+        *) shift ;;
+    esac
+done
+
+# --- Detect platform ---
+detect_platform() {
+    local os arch
+
+    case "$(uname -s)" in
+        Linux*)  os="linux" ;;
+        Darwin*) os="darwin" ;;
+        *)
+            echo "Error: Unsupported operating system: $(uname -s)"
+            exit 1
+            ;;
+    esac
+
+    case "$(uname -m)" in
+        x86_64|amd64)  arch="amd64" ;;
+        aarch64|arm64) arch="arm64" ;;
+        *)
+            echo "Error: Unsupported architecture: $(uname -m)"
+            exit 1
+            ;;
+    esac
+
+    echo "${os}_${arch}"
+}
+
+# --- Resolve version ---
+resolve_version() {
+    if [ -n "$VERSION" ]; then
+        echo "$VERSION"
+        return
+    fi
+
+    echo "Resolving latest version..." >&2
+
+    # Try to get latest stable release (non-prerelease)
+    local latest
+    latest=$(curl -sSL "${GITHUB_API}/repos/${REPO}/releases" \
+        | grep -o '"tag_name": *"[^"]*"' \
+        | head -20 \
+        | sed 's/"tag_name": *"//;s/"//' \
+        | grep -E '^v[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+$' \
+        | head -1)
+
+    # Fall back to latest release (including prereleases)
+    if [ -z "$latest" ]; then
+        latest=$(curl -sSL "${GITHUB_API}/repos/${REPO}/releases/latest" \
+            | grep -o '"tag_name": *"[^"]*"' \
+            | sed 's/"tag_name": *"//;s/"//')
+    fi
+
+    if [ -z "$latest" ]; then
+        echo "Error: Could not determine latest version" >&2
+        exit 1
+    fi
+
+    echo "$latest"
+}
+
+# --- Download and extract ---
+download_binary() {
+    local name="$1" version="$2" platform="$3"
+    local url="https://github.com/${REPO}/releases/download/${version}/${name}_${version#v}_${platform}.tar.gz"
+
+    echo "  Downloading ${name} ${version} (${platform})..."
+    if ! curl -sSL --fail -o "/tmp/${name}.tar.gz" "$url" 2>/dev/null; then
+        echo "  Warning: Failed to download ${name} from ${url}"
+        return 1
+    fi
+
+    tar xzf "/tmp/${name}.tar.gz" -C "$INSTALL_DIR"
+    rm -f "/tmp/${name}.tar.gz"
+    return 0
+}
+
+# --- Open browser ---
+open_browser() {
+    local url="$1"
+    if command -v open &>/dev/null; then
+        open "$url"
+    elif command -v xdg-open &>/dev/null; then
+        xdg-open "$url"
+    else
+        echo "  Open your browser to: $url"
+    fi
+}
+
+# --- Main ---
+echo "=== KubeStellar Console Quick Start ==="
+echo ""
+
+# Check prerequisites
+if ! command -v curl &>/dev/null; then
+    echo "Error: curl is required but not found."
+    exit 1
+fi
+
+PLATFORM=$(detect_platform)
+VERSION=$(resolve_version)
+
+echo "  Version:  $VERSION"
+echo "  Platform: $PLATFORM"
+echo "  Directory: $INSTALL_DIR"
+echo ""
+
+# Create install directory
+mkdir -p "$INSTALL_DIR"
+
+# Download binaries
+echo "Downloading binaries..."
+download_binary "console" "$VERSION" "$PLATFORM"
+
+# kc-agent is optional — it bridges the browser to local kubeconfig
+if ! download_binary "kc-agent" "$VERSION" "$PLATFORM"; then
+    echo "  (kc-agent is optional — local cluster features will be limited)"
+fi
+
+# Make binaries executable
+chmod +x "$INSTALL_DIR/console" 2>/dev/null || true
+chmod +x "$INSTALL_DIR/kc-agent" 2>/dev/null || true
+
+# Kill any existing instances on required ports
+for p in $PORT 8585; do
+    EXISTING_PID=$(lsof -ti :"$p" 2>/dev/null || true)
+    if [ -n "$EXISTING_PID" ]; then
+        echo "Killing existing process on port $p (PID: $EXISTING_PID)..."
+        kill -9 "$EXISTING_PID" 2>/dev/null || true
+        sleep 1
+    fi
+done
+
+# Load .env file if it exists
+if [ -f "$INSTALL_DIR/.env" ]; then
+    echo "Loading .env file..."
+    while IFS='=' read -r key value; do
+        [[ $key =~ ^#.*$ ]] && continue
+        [[ -z "$key" ]] && continue
+        value="${value%\"}"
+        value="${value#\"}"
+        value="${value%\'}"
+        value="${value#\'}"
+        export "$key=$value"
+    done < "$INSTALL_DIR/.env"
+elif [ -f ".env" ]; then
+    echo "Loading .env file..."
+    while IFS='=' read -r key value; do
+        [[ $key =~ ^#.*$ ]] && continue
+        [[ -z "$key" ]] && continue
+        value="${value%\"}"
+        value="${value#\"}"
+        value="${value%\'}"
+        value="${value#\'}"
+        export "$key=$value"
+    done < ".env"
+fi
+
+# Cleanup on exit
+CONSOLE_PID=""
+AGENT_PID=""
+cleanup() {
+    echo ""
+    echo "Shutting down..."
+    [ -n "$CONSOLE_PID" ] && kill "$CONSOLE_PID" 2>/dev/null || true
+    [ -n "$AGENT_PID" ] && kill "$AGENT_PID" 2>/dev/null || true
+    exit 0
+}
+trap cleanup SIGINT SIGTERM
+
+# Start kc-agent if available
+if [ -x "$INSTALL_DIR/kc-agent" ]; then
+    echo "Starting kc-agent..."
+    "$INSTALL_DIR/kc-agent" &
+    AGENT_PID=$!
+    sleep 1
+fi
+
+# Start console (serves frontend from web/dist at the specified port)
+echo "Starting console on port $PORT..."
+cd "$INSTALL_DIR"
+PORT="$PORT" DEV_MODE="${DEV_MODE:-true}" ./console --port "$PORT" &
+CONSOLE_PID=$!
+
+# Wait for console to be ready
+echo ""
+echo "Waiting for console to start..."
+MAX_WAIT=60
+WAITED=0
+while [ $WAITED -lt $MAX_WAIT ]; do
+    HTTP_CODE=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' "http://localhost:${PORT}" 2>/dev/null || echo "000")
+    if [ "$HTTP_CODE" = "200" ]; then
+        break
+    fi
+    sleep 2
+    WAITED=$((WAITED + 2))
+    printf "  %ds..." "$WAITED"
+done
+echo ""
+
+if [ "$HTTP_CODE" = "200" ]; then
+    echo ""
+    echo "=== KubeStellar Console is running ==="
+    echo ""
+    echo "  URL: http://localhost:${PORT}"
+    echo ""
+    open_browser "http://localhost:${PORT}"
+    echo "Press Ctrl+C to stop"
+    echo ""
+    wait
+else
+    echo ""
+    echo "Warning: Console did not respond within ${MAX_WAIT}s"
+    echo "Check if it's still starting: curl http://localhost:${PORT}"
+    echo ""
+    wait
+fi
